data.title: Is Relay Therapeutics (RLAY) Building a Durable Precision-Medicine Platform with Its Zovegalisib Strategy?

  • By aiming a mutant-selective PI3Kα inhibitor at both PIK3CA-driven vascular anomalies and certain breast cancers, Relay Therapeutics is linking a single precision-medicine platform to multiple genetically defined disease areas.
